about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hello! My name is Raycka and I am a developer passionate about creating modern, functional, and visually striking interfaces. My focus is transforming ideas into fluid and intuitive digital experiences.
about.p2: I work with Front-End and Back-End development, always aiming to write clean, organized, and scalable code. I enjoy exploring new technologies every day, understanding how things work behind the scenes, and constantly evolving as a professional.
about.p3: Beyond the technical side, I highly value collaboration, communication, and creativity. I believe that great projects are born when people unite their skills and build something amazing together.

hardSkills.title: Hard Skills

hardSkills.frontendDesc: Creation of modern, responsive, and accessible interfaces
hardSkills.backendDesc: REST APIs, business logic, and integrations
hardSkills.databaseDesc: Modeling, SQL queries, and application integration
hardSkills.bestPracticesDesc: Versioning, clean code, and performance optimization

featured.title: Top Projects
featured.desc: Here are some of my favorite projects — each with its unique visual identity, purpose, and challenges. Explore and see how I apply design, code, and creativity in every delivery.

contactPage.ctaDesc: Click the button below to start a conversation directly on my WhatsApp.

projectsPage.title: 🚀 My Projects
projectsPage.desc: Here you'll find a collection of my projects organized by category and status. Explore each section to learn more about my work in different areas like intelligent systems, landing pages, and full applications.
projectsPage.recentIntro: Latest launched projects, highlighting continuous evolution in design, architecture, and user experience
projectsPage.developingIntro: Projects in the implementation phase, where ideas are being transformed into functional systems with constant testing and improvements
projectsPage.landingIntro: Static pages developed to train FrontEnd skills, responsive design, and conversion optimization
projectsPage.academicIntro: Projects developed in an academic context, applying theory to practical solutions and exploring different languages and frameworks
projectsPage.othersIntro: Projects developed during my participation in Bootcamps, Immersions, and Hackathons
